creator: roberto@keltia.freenix.fr
text:
According to Stefan Zehl:
> >> No MD5 checksum file.
> ===>  Extracting for latex2e-95.06
> ===>  latex2e-95.06 depends on executable: tex - found
> ===>  Patching for latex2e-95.06
> ===>  Configuring for latex2e-95.06
> ===>  Building for latex2e-95.06
[...]
> ******************************************************************
> * You are attempting to make a LaTeX format from a source file
> * That is more than one year old.
> *
> * If you enter <return> to scroll past this message then the format
> * will be built, but please consider obtaining newer source files
> * before continuing to build LaTeX.
> *
> * LaTeX is re-issued every 6 months June and December.
> ******************************************************************

You can either install teTeX 0.3.4 (which is in ports  too and has a proper
LaTeX  from June '96) or wait  a little for  0.4 which should be out before
the end of the month.

Except  for mltex,  I don't  think  we should keep   the old tex and  latex
ports.   Even mltex should   not be that necessary   as  Bernard Gaulle has
modified its  french style to be  Babel compatible (haven't tried it though
as I am waiting for teTeX 0.4 to upgrade).
-- 
Ollivier ROBERT    -=- The daemon is FREE! -=-    roberto@keltia.freenix.fr
